_comment: Copy to config.json and adjust values as needed.

paper_trading._comment: starting_balance USD; leverage; percent of available equity to reserve; maker/taker fees and slippage in basis points.

risk_management._comment: The stop loss is evaluated against each fetched candle close.

execution._comment: Paper loop polling cadence and simulated fee type.

strategies._comment: Set active_strategy to switch without Python changes. enabled controls inclusion in --strategy all backtests.

backtest._comment: Initial simulated balance, cost toggles, Coinbase candle size in seconds, and default historical window.

dashboard._comment: Refresh cadence, number of chart rows, display timeframe label, and default strategy.
